$comment: AI Tagger Universe -> Ollama (local or rig, chosen per device). The __OLLAMA_*__ tokens are substituted by bootstrap from the resolved AI backend. Endpoint MUST be Ollama's OpenAI-COMPATIBLE path (/v1/chat/completions), not /api. Tags are written to YAML frontmatter (no inline mode). Requires the chat model to be pulled on whichever host serves it.
